scenarioName: Internal Edit - Change Venue and Time (Happy Path)
objective: Validate that an internal service can edit a CONFIRMED booking's venue and time while preserving booking artifacts and atomically updating roster slots

seedData.description: Original venue and target venue for edit
Future booking (server time < start_at) with default assignment statuses
Original roster slots reserved for the booking at original venue/time
Available roster slots for same duo at target venue/time
Duo assignments at default statuses (no matching/presence progression)

payloadRules.venueId: Reference to target venue (different from original)
payloadRules.startAt: Future ISO-8601 timestamp with available roster slots for same duo

steps.layman: Internal service requests to change the booking's venue and start time

expectedBehavior: Validate X-Internal-Token header is present and valid
Reject if Bearer token is provided instead (INTERNAL ONLY endpoint)
steps.layman: System verifies the request comes from an authorized internal service
System validates the booking can be edited (not extended, not started, not progressed)

expectedBehavior: Load and lock both assignment rows FOR UPDATE
Verify assignments are at default statuses (ASSIGNED, NOT_MATCHED, WAITING_FOR_CLIENT)
steps.layman: System locks the booking and verifies no matching/presence has progressed

expectedBehavior: Release current roster slots: UPDATE roster_slots SET status='AVAILABLE', booking_id=NULL WHERE booking_id={{BOOKING_ID}}
Verify exactly 2 rows affected (data integrity check)
steps.layman: System releases the currently reserved roster slots for this booking

expectedBehavior: Lock target slots: SELECT ... WHERE venue_id=targetVenueId AND start_at=targetStartAt AND end_at=targetEndAt AND status='AVAILABLE' AND companion_id IN (captainId, viceCaptainId) FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
Reserve slots: UPDATE roster_slots SET status='BOOKED', booking_id={{BOOKING_ID}}
steps.layman: System reserves the new roster slots for the same duo at the target venue/time

expectedBehavior: Update booking: SET venue_id=targetVenueId, start_at=targetStartAt, end_at=targetEndAt WHERE id={{BOOKING_ID}}
Do NOT change: qr_code, pin_code, com_match_qr_code, com_match_pin_code, booking_color
steps.layman: System updates the booking's venue and time while preserving all booking artifacts
System returns the updated booking with new venue and time
Verify booking was updated with new venue/time but artifacts remain unchanged
Verify original roster slots are now available
Verify new roster slots are reserved for this booking
Verify duo assignments remain unchanged (no reassignment requested)

api: Venue and time updated in response
db: New roster slots reserved (BOOKED, booking_id set)
Exactly 2 old slots released, 2 new slots reserved
businessRules: Duo remains the same when no reassignment requested

notes: Tests venue and time change without companion reassignment
Validates deadlock-safe slot locking (FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED)
Validates row-count guards for data integrity
